Reviews Contact

Revive Your Jacksonville Property

Onyx Power Washing removes years of grime, salt, and mildew from your home's exterior. Serving Duval County with experienced technicians who understand Florida's tough climate.

★★★★★ 6+ Verified Reviews

What We Do

Our Services

Professional power washing solutions tailored to your needs.

Residential Power Washing

Complete exterior cleaning for Jacksonville homes of all ages and materials.

Learn More →

Driveway & Pavement Cleaning

Remove oil stains, tire marks, and years of built-up grime from hard surfaces.

Learn More →

Roof Cleaning

Safe, effective removal of algae, moss, and stains from all roof types.

Learn More →

Deck & Patio Cleaning

Restore outdoor living spaces damaged by humidity, sun, and salt air.

Learn More →

Commercial Power Washing

Maintain professional properties to Jacksonville's high standards.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality power washing services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

The Onyx team transformed our 20-year-old shingle roof in San Marco that was covered in black streaks. They explained exactly how their soft wash system works and why it's better for older roofs. A year later, the algae still hasn't returned like it did with other companies' pressure washing.

Marshall T.
★★★★★

Our Riverside historic district home has an original cypress deck that was gray and splintering. Onyx brought it back to life without using harsh pressure that could have damaged the century-old wood. They even matched the original nail patterns when reattaching a few loose boards they found during cleaning.

Leanne K.
★★★★★

After years of oil changes in my Avondale driveway, I thought the stains were permanent. Onyx used some kind of magical degreaser that lifted everything without etching the concrete. They even cleaned the historic brick edging by hand to avoid damage. My neighbors have all asked who did the work.

Devon R.
★★★★★

Living near Jacksonville Beach means constant salt buildup on our siding. Onyx's team knew exactly how to clean our particular type of fiber cement without forcing water behind the panels. They took time to explain why certain areas need more frequent cleaning than others based on wind patterns.

Sophia L.
★★★★★

Our medical office building near St. Johns Town Center needed to look pristine for an accreditation visit. Onyx worked after hours to clean every inch of exterior - from removing years of pollen buildup to carefully cleaning our delicate signage. The inspectors actually complimented the building's appearance.

Carlos M.
★★★★★

The pavers around our Mandarin pool were so slick with algae we couldn't let the kids go barefoot. Onyx not only made them look brand new but explained how to adjust our sprinklers to prevent rapid regrowth. They even noticed some loose stones we hadn't and reset them properly.

Natalie W.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Onyx Power Washing

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

Will power washing damage my old Jacksonville home?
Our technicians are trained in historic home preservation. We use specialized low-pressure techniques and cleaning solutions safe for aged materials.
How often should Jacksonville homes be power washed?
Most homes near the coast benefit from annual cleaning due to salt exposure. Inland properties can often go 18-24 months between cleanings.
Do you clean screened lanais and pool cages?
Yes, we offer cage cleaning services to remove the pollen and mildew that accumulates in our humid climate.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Onyx Power Washing.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
